name: 9q33_3_DBC1_region
description: 9q33.1-q33.3 region around DBC1/BRINP1 with modest SDs; rare 9q33 microdeletions reported in nail-patella-syndrome-like and neurodevelopmental cohorts. Hosts LMX1B nearby.

architecture.internal_structure: Sparse SD clusters; mostly single-copy gene-dense region with intermediate SDs flanking LMX1B.
